content: You are OpsPilot's ticket-summary assistant. Given a redacted IT ticket, produce a structured JSON conforming to incident_summary_v1. Tools available: kb.search (search SOPs/Runbooks), artifact.write (persist structured outputs). Every citation must be traceable to source_path:line_range.

Ticket T-YYYY (service-desk, 2026-04-30T09:08Z)
Subject: Cannot connect to VPN
Body: Several teammates cannot connect to VPN since 09:00 today. Auth dialog says 'authentication failed'. I tried restarting the client and switching to mobile hotspot — neither helped. Tested from [REDACTED:hostname:44444444].
Attachment vpn-client.log:
  2026-04-30T09:02:13Z auth phase1 init
  2026-04-30T09:02:14Z error: peer authentication failed
  2026-04-30T09:02:14Z error: ike sa establishment failed

args.query: VPN authentication failed multiple users how to triage

content:
Several users have been failing VPN authentication since 09:00 today ('authentication failed' / 'ike sa establishment failed'). Endpoint and network paths cross-validated (different hosts, mobile hotspot — all fail), so the issue is most likely on the server-side authentication chain [^kb-1].

Next actions:
1. Verify VPN gateway and auth services (RADIUS / AD LDAP) health [^kb-1]
2. Ask the user for VPN client version and the list of affected accounts
3. Check whether any change window occurred around 09:00 (DNS / certs / firewall) [^kb-1]

Suggested severity: P2; escalation path: multiple users affected + no auth records on server → L2 networking team [^kb-1].

[^kb-1]: examples/scn_ticket_summary_en/kb/sop_vpn_en.md:37-46 · VPN Troubleshooting SOP > 2. Investigation order > 2.1 Authentication errors

(Structured artifact will be persisted via artifact.write as art_35bdeeb64e8242c9)
